payload.src_code:
class OrderStatus(str, Enum):
    CREATED = "created"
    PAYMENT_INTENT_CREATED = "payment_intent_created"
    AUTHORIZED = "authorized"
    APPROVED_FOR_CAPTURE = "approved_for_capture"
    CAPTURED = "captured"
    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED = "partially_refunded"
    REFUNDED = "refunded"
    DISPUTED = "disputed"
    CANCELED = "canceled"
    FAILED = "failed"

@dataclass
class Order:
    amount: int
    amount_captured: int = 0
    amount_refunded: int = 0
    status: OrderStatus = OrderStatus.CREATED
    requires_review: bool = False
    approved_for_capture: bool = False
    ...

payload.description: capture_payment preserves amount invariant: 0 <= refunded <= captured <= amount
payload.src:
let prop_capture_preserves_amounts (amt: int) (o: order) =
  inv_amounts o ==> inv_amounts (capture_payment amt o)

artifacts.name: bug_diagnosis
artifacts.summary: Bug: capture_payment sets amount_captured = amt but does not reset amount_refunded

artifacts.name: updated_iml_model
artifacts.summary: Updated IML model with 3DS, high-risk approvals, and capture bug fix

payload.iml_code:
(* Fixed capture + new may_capture with 3DS/approval checks *)
let required_approvals (o: order) =
  if o.high_risk then 2
  else if o.requires_review then 1
  else 0

let may_capture (o: order) =
  (o.status = Authorized || o.status = ApprovedForCapture) &&
  o.latest_charge_exists &&
  ((not o.three_ds_required) || o.three_ds_completed) &&
  o.approval_count >= required_approvals o

let capture_payment (amt: int) (o: order) : order =
  if may_capture o && 0 < amt && amt <= o.amount then
    { o with
      amount_captured = amt;
      amount_refunded = 0;    (* FIX: reset on re-capture *)
      status = Captured
    }
  else o

payload.description: 3DS blocks authorization: confirm -> RequiresAction when 3DS required but not completed
payload.src:
let goal_3ds_blocks_authorization (o: order) =
  o.status = PaymentIntentCreated &&
  o.payment_intent_exists &&
  o.three_ds_required &&
  not o.three_ds_completed ==>
  (confirm_payment_intent o).status = RequiresAction

payload.description: high-risk orders require exactly 2 approvals before capture
payload.src:
let goal_high_risk_needs_two_approvals (amt: int) (o: order) =
  inv_amounts o &&
  o.high_risk &&
  o.approval_count < 2 &&
  o.status <> Captured ==>
  (capture_payment amt o).status <> Captured

payload.description: high-risk + 3DS: capture blocked unless both 3DS completed AND 2 approvals
payload.src:
let goal_high_risk_3ds_requires_both (amt: int) (o: order) =
  inv_amounts o &&
  o.high_risk &&
  o.three_ds_required &&
  (not o.three_ds_completed || o.approval_count < 2) &&
  o.status <> Captured ==>
  (capture_payment amt o).status <> Captured

regions.invariant: order unchanged - blocked by insufficient approvals

tests.name: test_create_payment_intent_success
tests.code:
def test_create_payment_intent_success():
    o = Order(amount=100, status=OrderStatus.CREATED)
    result = step(Action(ActionKind.CREATE_PAYMENT_INTENT), o)
    assert result.status == OrderStatus.PAYMENT_INTENT_CREATED
    assert result.payment_intent_exists == True

tests.name: test_3ds_blocks_confirm
tests.code:
def test_3ds_blocks_confirm():
    o = Order(amount=100, status=OrderStatus.PAYMENT_INTENT_CREATED,
              three_ds_required=True, three_ds_completed=False,
              payment_intent_exists=True)
    result = step(Action(ActionKind.CONFIRM_PAYMENT_INTENT), o)
    assert result.status == OrderStatus.REQUIRES_ACTION

tests.name: test_high_risk_capture_with_2_approvals
tests.code:
def test_high_risk_capture_with_2_approvals():
    """Region 67: high-risk capture succeeds with 2 approvals"""
    o = Order(amount=39, amount_captured=1, amount_refunded=3,
              status=OrderStatus.AUTHORIZED, high_risk=True,
              approval_count=2, latest_charge_exists=True)
    result = step(Action(ActionKind.CAPTURE, 39), o)
    assert result.status == OrderStatus.CAPTURED
    assert result.amount_captured == 39
    assert result.amount_refunded == 0

tests.name: test_high_risk_capture_blocked_1_approval
tests.code:
def test_high_risk_capture_blocked_1_approval():
    o = Order(amount=100, status=OrderStatus.AUTHORIZED,
              high_risk=True, approval_count=1,
              latest_charge_exists=True)
    result = step(Action(ActionKind.CAPTURE, 50), o)
    assert result.status == OrderStatus.AUTHORIZED  # unchanged

tests.name: test_full_refund
tests.code:
def test_full_refund():
    o = Order(amount=100, amount_captured=100,
              status=OrderStatus.CAPTURED)
    result = step(Action(ActionKind.REFUND, 100), o)
    assert result.status == OrderStatus.REFUNDED
    assert result.amount_refunded == 100

actions.label: Read: stripe_payment_flow.py (~700 lines)
actions.detail: Flask app with Stripe payment processing: order creation, PaymentIntent, manual capture, approval, refund, cancel, dispute webhooks. 10 order statuses, 8 actions.
actions.rationale: understand the existing payment flow before adding new features

actions.label: Analyze: state machine with 10 statuses, 8 actions
actions.detail: Payment flow is a state machine: Created -> PaymentIntentCreated -> Authorized -> ApprovedForCapture -> Captured -> PartiallyRefunded/Refunded. Plus Canceled, Disputed, Failed branches.
actions.rationale: map the state machine before formalization

actions.label: Formalize: original payment flow -> IML
actions.rationale: translate Python state machine into pure functional IML for formal analysis

actions.label: Define: amount invariant - 0 <= refunded <= captured <= amount
actions.rationale: the core safety property: monetary amounts must always be consistent across all transitions
actions.result_summary: verify: capture preserves 0 <= refunded <= captured <= amount

actions.label: Verify: amount invariant - REFUTED!
actions.rationale: ImandraX found a counterexample: re-capture after partial refund leaves amount_refunded > amount_captured
actions.result_summary: refuted - counterexample: re-capture after partial refund

actions.label: Analyze: capture_payment fails to reset amount_refunded
actions.detail: The bug: capture_payment sets amount_captured = amt but doesn't reset amount_refunded. After a partial refund (refunded=1238), re-capturing with amt=1 leaves refunded=1238 > captured=1.
actions.rationale: diagnose the root cause from the counterexample
actions.result_summary: root cause: amount_refunded not reset on re-capture

observations.statement: capture_payment overwrites amount_captured but preserves amount_refunded, violating the invariant after partial refund + re-capture

actions.label: Fix: add amount_refunded = 0 to capture_payment
actions.detail: One-line fix: reset amount_refunded to 0 when re-capturing
actions.rationale: fix the bug discovered by formal verification

actions.label: Formalize: updated flow with 3DS + high-risk
actions.rationale: extend the IML model with new features: RequiresAction status, 3DS flags, approval_count, high_risk requiring 2 approvals

actions.label: Define: 7 amount invariant properties (one per transition)
actions.rationale: verify that EVERY transition function preserves the amount invariant
actions.result_summary: 7 verify goals defined, one per transition function

actions.label: Verify: all 7 amount invariants - PROVED
actions.rationale: after the fix, all transition functions preserve the amount invariant

actions.label: Define: 3DS blocks authorization until completed
actions.rationale: new feature property: if 3DS is required but not completed, confirm must move to RequiresAction, not Authorized

actions.label: Verify: 3DS blocks authorization - proved
actions.rationale: confirmed: 3DS challenge properly gates the authorization flow

actions.label: Define: high-risk needs 2 approvals before capture
actions.rationale: new feature property: high-risk orders with fewer than 2 approvals must not reach Captured status

actions.label: Verify: high-risk 2-approval rule - proved
actions.rationale: confirmed: capture is blocked for high-risk orders with fewer than 2 approvals

actions.label: Define: combined high-risk + 3DS requires both
actions.rationale: compound property: high-risk orders with 3DS need BOTH 3DS completion AND 2 approvals

actions.label: Verify: combined high-risk + 3DS - proved
actions.rationale: confirmed: both conditions must be satisfied for capture

actions.label: Decompose: step function - 84 exhaustive regions
actions.rationale: partition the entire input space of the step function to discover every distinct execution path

actions.label: Generate: 84 tests from step decomposition
actions.rationale: produce concrete Python test cases from every region

actions.label: Edit: stripe_payment_flow_updated.py
actions.detail: Apply all changes to Python implementation: add 3DS flow, high-risk 2-approval gate, fix capture_payment refund reset
actions.rationale: implement the verified model in production code

actions.label: Tests: 84/84 pass
actions.detail: all 84 generated test cases pass against the updated Python implementation
actions.rationale: validate that formal model and implementation agree on every execution path

actions.label: Commit: add 3DS + high-risk support, fix capture bug
actions.detail: Includes: updated IML model, updated Python, 84 generated tests, all 14 VGs proved
actions.rationale: all properties verified, all tests passing

outcome.summary: Added 3DS/SCA and high-risk 2-approval support to Stripe payment flow. Formal verification discovered and fixed a re-capture bug. 14 properties proved, 84 exhaustive test regions generated.

policies.name: research_before_edit

policies.name: trace_has_proper_lifecycle

policies.name: files_modified_consistent

policies.name: reasoning_required_for_high_stakes_changes
